subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and made manifest the clear proofs, as a grace from His presence. Verily, He is the Compassionate, the All-Bountiful. Blessed be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات فضلا من لدنه انه هو المشفق الکریم طوبی
